programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Tim Tebow capped his brief and unbelievable NFL career with a bang in the 2011 Wild Card round by toppling the 12-4 Pittsburgh Steelers in overtime.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.sub-title: 2012 AFC Divisional Round: Ravens vs. Broncos
programme.desc: The iconic Mile High Miracle where the Baltimore Ravens hand the Denver Broncos a 38-35 divisional playoff loss in double overtime after rookie kicker Justin Tucker drills a game-winning, 47-yard field goal.

programme.title: NFL 360
programme.desc: Raiders linebacker Carl Nassib comes out as gay and helps transform lives, and Super Bowl champion Osi Umenyiora helps Nigerian prospects escape dramatic hardships.

programme.title: NFL Films Presents
programme.sub-title: Jeff Rohrer, Esera Tuaolo, Vince Lombardi - Pride Month
programme.desc: Jeff Rohrer, Esera Tuaolo, and Vince Lombardi are LGBTQ+ allies in sports, advocating for visibility and acceptance. Celebrate their contributions during Pride Month.

programme.title: NFL Media Originals
programme.desc: This Pride Month, the NFL honors Richard Fierro for his acts of bravery as he and other survivors of the shooting share their stories of healing, the importance of safe spaces and their hope for unity in the future.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: After cutting a 21-3 deficit to 21-6 with an Adam Vinatieri field goal at the half, Peyton Manning took it upon himself in the second half to reassign the choker label directly to his counterpart.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.sub-title: 2005 AFC Divisional Round: Steelers vs. Colts
programme.desc: Despite a 15 point fourth quarter from the Indianapolis Colts, the Pittsburgh Steelers ended with 21-18 victory to advance to the AFC title game.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: Brett Kollmann breaks down how the Butt Fumble was caused by events that took place 36 years prior.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.sub-title: 25 Elite Players Traded In Their Prime
programme.desc: See which NFL superstars were shockingly traded at the peak of their careers.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: During the matchup between the New Orleans Saints and the Minnesota Vikings, a last-minute 61-yard touchdown by Stefon Diggs gave Minnesota a 29-24 victory over New Orleans to send the Vikings to the NFC championship game.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Relive the 2018 AFC Championship matchup between the New England Patriots and the Kansas City Chiefs.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Relive the 2018 AFC Championship matchup between the New England Patriots and the Kansas City Chiefs.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Aaron Rodgers throws a 36-yard pass to a toe-dragging Jared Cook on the sideline, and Mason Crosby kicked a 51-yard field goal as time expired to defeat the Cowboys, sending the Packers to the NFC Championship game.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Aaron Rodgers throws a 36-yard pass to a toe-dragging Jared Cook on the sideline, and Mason Crosby kicked a 51-yard field goal as time expired to defeat the Cowboys, sending the Packers to the NFC Championship game.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.sub-title: 2012 NFC Divisional Round: Seahawks vs. Falcons
programme.desc: Matt Bryant's late field goal stuns Seattle Seahawks and lifts the Atlanta Falcons to a playoff win.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.sub-title: 2012 NFC Divisional Round: Seahawks vs. Falcons

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: Halley talks to Stephen Curry, Ray Romano, Tony Romo, and Charles Barkley to get advice at the American Century Championship in Lake Tahoe.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: Hally is haunted by an apparition; Emilia Migliaccio's decision to join golf media rather than turn pro.

programme.title: Build a Better Game
programme.desc: Focusing on priming the setup and utilizing ground force to increase driving distance.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Golf instructor Michael Breed answers viewers' e-mail questions.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: To improve your golf swing.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake is helping you find more fairways in the ultimate quest to hit your driver straight. Devan explains why things like depth and width are crucial to hitting straight drives.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake is here to explain how ground forces work in the golf swing; he has tips, drills, and exercises to help you train all three of the ground forces involved in the swing.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy answers questions from GolfPass members about how to hit shots around trees, techniques for downhill bunker lies and the keys to hitting flighted wedge shots.

programme.title: Golf Road Trippin'
programme.desc: Full-time comedian and part-time golfer James Davis heads to sunny San Diego to see all that Omni La Costa Resort & Spa has to offer - an old school Hollywood stomping ground.

programme.title: Golf Road Trippin'
programme.desc: James Davis hits the road and lets viewers ride shotgun for a scenic trip across the southwest, hitting a few special golf courses along the way.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Ian Poulter, 12-time European Tour winner and Ryder Cup stalwart, showcases his very best putting instruction. He shares his best advice on how to improve your scoring from all distances on the green.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Ian Poulter showcases his very best putting instruction. He teaches how to make more putts focusing on comfort and your natural abilities on the greens.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Ian Poulter gives advice on lowering a handicap through better iron play.

programme.title: The Swing Gym
programme.desc: Exercises to help golf game.

programme.title: The Swing Gym
programme.desc: Fitness coach Don Saladino helps maximize distance, improve flexibility and play pain-free golf.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: What an alternate golf universe looks like; troubles lefties face in golf; a new product that could be the next big thing in golf.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: A PSA that takes on cheaters in charity golf scrambles; how surfers and skateboarders are changing golf.

programme.title: The Conor Moore Show
programme.desc: The most popular comedy skits and sketches from three seasons of The Conor Moore Show; from marriage counseling to the best (or worst) swing coach in the world, Conor and friends are guaranteed to provide a laugh.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: In this compilation of Martin Hall's most popular Daily Video Tips, he uses an umbrella, an eyeball and a bunch of catchy phrases to help people play better golf.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: Hit longer drives, dial in the swing path and improve all aspects of the short game with these tips from Devan Bonebrake.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: Hit high, powerful draws with the driver and compress irons like never before with these tips from Chris Como.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: Eliminate errors like a poor takeaway, swaying too much and chunking chips with these tips from Nathalie Sheehan; learn how to hit the perfect flop shot and putt like Tiger.

programme.title: GolfPass Top Tips
programme.desc: Gain distance and find more fairways with this collection of driving tips from world-class GolfPass instructors.

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes
programme.desc: At Salgados in the Algarve, Chris plays the seventh hole, a par 4, and enjoys an afternoon in the sunshine as he takes on the palm-lined course.

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes
programme.desc: Chris and Paul play the 16th hole at the Royal course at Vale do Lobo, a famous course in Portugal.

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes
programme.desc: Paul and Chris play the 18th hole at Quinta do Lago Laranjal in the Algarve, the newest of the three courses at Quinta do Lago.

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes
programme.desc: Paul and Chris play the sixth hole, a dogleg par 4, at a hilltop course in Lisbon, Portugal, at Penha Longa in the Cascais area.

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes
programme.desc: Paul and Chris play the 14th hole in Aroeira near Lisbon, Portugal, a course that Paul knows well from playing the Portuguese Open.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal honor Arnold Palmer and his lasting legacy on golf instruction. They demonstrate the two anchors to Palmer's powerful swing and drills to add a little Arnie to your own game.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach cures for fatal flaws in golf games. Learn drills to get into the proper position at the top with the driver, ways to improve iron play, and a tip to correct the single biggest flaw in the short game.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the setup and swing keys needed to stick approach shots. Martin shares a drill to help make solid contact, reveals the three important post-impact checkpoints, and shows how to develop proper lower body action.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: This lesson features tips on improving drives, chipping and putting, with useful advice for everyone.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal are at Four Seasons Golf and Sports Club Orlando to teach the key shots in the scoring zone. Martin reveals a tip for mid-wedge shots he learned in-person from 2019 Masters champion Tiger Woods.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach great drills that require a partner. Martin also teaches teamwork tips for driving it longer, sticking your approach shots, hitting solid pitch shots, and making more putts.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to putt like the U.S. Open champion. Learn drills to improve your grip, aim, path and keys to sinking more putts. Martin also discusses what you can learn from Ben Hogan's legendary ball striking.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal join PGA TOUR stars on the range at the Rocket Mortgage Classic to teach how to hit it like the pros. Martin shares inside the ropes secrets to help crush the driver, make solid contact with irons, and spin wedges.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The 12 competitors arrive and are immediately faced with a challenge that they've never experienced before.

programme.title: Hang Tight
programme.desc: Don't go anywhere, we'll be right back.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Alliances are formed and a dispute erupts among competitors.
